headline: Gulf Worries Worsen: Heard on Street Recap
summary: Hopes that the war in Iran will end quickly faded after the country attacked more ships and its new supreme leader vowed to fight on.  The Brent Crude benchmark jumped more than 9%, its largest one-day increase since 2020, after President Trump said stopping Iran's nuclear efforts was a higher priority than oil prices.  The Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite all lost more than 1.5% by the closing bell.

The Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite all lost more than 1.5% by the closing bell.

headline: Costco Sues Government, Customer Sues Costco. Tariff Refunds Are Getting Messy.
summary: When the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s tariffs last month, the development was expected to be a boon to retailers like  Costco Wholesale  That may not be the case.  Costco on Wednesday became the first retailer to face a potential class-action lawsuit related to tariff refunds.  A suit filed in Illinois federal court alleges that Costco owes its shoppers refunds in lieu of the Supreme Court’s ruling against Trump’s sweeping tariffs enacted under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act.
